_readme: This file is a human-readable snapshot of db/echo.db (SQLite).
It is NOT read by any code — the live database is the source of truth.
then `python3 db/seed.py` to repopulate the real DB from live GHSA data.

cves.description: One row per CVE. Populated by db/discover.py from GitHub Security Advisories.

columns.cve_id: CVE-YYYY-NNNNN identifier (or GHSA-xxxx fallback if no CVE assigned)
columns.severity: Low | Medium | High | Critical  (mapped from GHSA LOW/MODERATE/HIGH/CRITICAL)
columns.cvss_score: CVSS v3 base score (float), e.g. 7.5. NULL if GHSA has no score.
columns.first_patched_version: The first safe release according to GHSA, e.g. '1.26.5'
columns.description: One-line summary from the GHSA advisory

description: One row per affected version range within a CVE.
A single CVE can have multiple groups (e.g. urllib3 v1 branch vs v2 branch).
The builder writes artifact_filename / artifact_sha256 / built_at once it builds the wheel.
discover.py uses INSERT OR IGNORE so a row with a built artifact is never overwritten.

columns.version_range: PEP 440 specifier, e.g. '>=1.25.4,<1.26.5'. Versions inside this range are vulnerable.
columns.pivot_version: Latest stable PyPI release inside version_range. The builder downloads this as the 'old' source.
columns.artifact_filename: Wheel filename once built, e.g. 'urllib3-1.26.4+echo1-py2.py3-none-any.whl'. NULL = not yet built.
columns.artifact_sha256: SHA-256 hex digest of the wheel file. Used by the PEP 503 index href fragment (#sha256=...).
columns.built_at: UTC timestamp of when the builder (or link_prebuilt_artifacts) last wrote this row.

description: One row per (package, version) pair that has ever been checked via GET /check/{package}/{version}.
Seeded synthetically by db/seed.py to set up the 30-day demand window demo.
Updated live by registry/server.py on every /check call (upsert: increments request_count).
The builder reads this table to decide which version_groups are worth building.
A group is eligible if: artifact_filename IS NULL AND any request_log row for the same
package+version (that falls inside version_range) has last_requested within the past 30 days.

columns.version: Exact version string that was installed/checked, e.g. '2.28.0'
columns.last_requested: UTC timestamp of the most recent /check call for this (package, version)
columns.request_count: Running total of /check calls. Incremented on every registry hit.

cves 1 ──< version_groups many: A CVE covering multiple release branches would have 2+ groups, each with its own pivot and wheel.
request_log is independent: No FK to cves or version_groups.
The builder joins them in Python: for each unbuilt group, check if any request_log row
for the same package has a version inside group.version_range AND last_requested > now-30d.

_data_flow.1_discovery: db/discover.py  →  queries GitHub GraphQL API (GHSA) for advisory nodes
_data_flow.2_pivot: db/discover.py  →  queries pypi.org/pypi/{pkg}/json, picks latest stable in range
_data_flow.3_upsert: db/discover.py  →  writes cves + version_groups rows; links pre-built wheels
_data_flow.4_seed: db/seed.py      →  writes synthetic request_log rows (demo timestamps)
_data_flow.5_registry: registry/server.py  →  upserts request_log on every /check call
_data_flow.6_builder: factory/builder.py  →  reads eligible groups, downloads sdist, builds +echo1 wheel, writes artifact_filename+sha256+built_at back to version_groups
_data_flow.7_serve: registry/server.py  →  reads version_groups JOIN cves to serve /simple/{pkg}/ and /check/{pkg}/{ver}

cves.description: Catastrophic backtracking in URL authority parser when passed URL containing many @ characters
Unintended leak of Proxy-Authorization header in requests

version_groups._note: urllib3 v1 branch — covers 1.25.4 through 1.26.4. Pre-built wheel linked by discover.py.
requests — built on-demand during the demo because 2.28.0 was requested 7 days ago.

request_log._note: 50 days ago — OUTSIDE 30-day window → builder skips
7 days ago — WITHIN 30-day window AND in CVE range → builder triggered BUILD for pivot 2.30.0. request_count incremented live by /check calls during demo.
45 days ago — OUTSIDE 30-day window → builder skips
15 days ago — WITHIN 30-day window AND in CVE range, but artifact already linked by discover.py → builder skips (artifact_filename IS NOT NULL). request_count incremented live.
5 days ago — WITHIN 30-day window but 2.3.0 is NOT in CVE range >=1.25.4,<1.26.5 → builder skips
